notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 30-34 in generated discovery row order.

immolation::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The initial Dexterity save, half-damage result, failed-save Burning state, and end-of-turn repeat save are now represented.
immolation::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new attack/save field required for this pass.
immolation::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by immediate DAMAGE plus Burning repeatSave.

immolation::repeat_save_or_recurring_che.issue: The burning target's end-of-turn Dexterity repeat save is now represented in runtime repeatSave data.

immolation::vision_light_sound.issue: Visible target selection is represented by lineOfSight, and the burning target's bright and dim light are now represented as a typed light utility effect.
immolation::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No new vision/light/sound field required for this pass.
immolation::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by lineOfSight and utilityType light.

immolation::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched damage and repeated damage prose, but the spell affects the target rather than creating independent terrain or environmental state.

immolation::conditional_ending.issue: Runtime represents successful repeat save ending, but it still lacks typed data for the flames being impossible to extinguish by nonmagical means.
immolation::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add extinguishability or ending-prevention fields for magical ongoing effects.
immolation::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime endingRestrictions data for nonmagical extinguishing immunity.

infernal-calling::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses a devil type by CR, and talisman possession changes the allowed CR and obedience behavior; runtime preserves these mode choices only in prose.
infernal-calling::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon choice fields for creature type, CR cap, talisman-specific summon, and altered obedience.

infernal-calling::attack_or_save_modifie.issue: Using the devil's true name grants advantage on contested command checks; runtime lacks contested-check and conditional advantage fields.
infernal-calling::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedTemplateChange: Add contested command-check fields with conditional advantage sources.

infernal-calling::target_filter_or_eligi.issue: The devil must appear in an unoccupied visible space within range; runtime has lineOfSight but lacks unoccupied-space eligibility.
infernal-calling::target_filter_or_eligi.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon destination eligibility fields for visible and unoccupied spaces.

infernal-calling::sustain_or_recast_acti.issue: The caster can issue a no-action command on each turn; runtime lacks repeat command economy for summoned entities.
infernal-calling::sustain_or_recast_acti.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon command cadence fields, including no-action each-turn commands.

infernal-calling::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible summon placement; that is represented by lineOfSight and the remaining unoccupied-space requirement is tracked under target_filter_or_eligibility.

infernal-calling::message_or_communicati.issue: Successful commands can include message-bearing and the devil returns to report completion; runtime lacks typed command/report communication fields.
infernal-calling::message_or_communicati.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned-entity command communication and completion report fields.

infernal-calling::summon_or_controlled_e.issue: The devil has its own initiative, DM control, hostile/default behavior, contested command obedience, failure immunity to commands, talisman override, and concentration-break aftermath; runtime keeps the whole summon/control model in prose.
infernal-calling::summon_or_controlled_e.recommendedTemplateChange: Add robust summoned-devil/control fields for initiative, controller, hostility, command checks, command immunity, talisman override, and post-concentration behavior.

infernal-calling::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The detector matched hostile behavior and obedience criteria, but this is summoned-entity control behavior rather than a ward/alarm trigger.

infernal-calling::object_stats_or_damage.issue: The devil disappears at 0 hit points, but runtime lacks typed summoned-entity hit-point/despawn behavior.
infernal-calling::object_stats_or_damage.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned-entity despawn conditions for 0 hit points and normal spell ending.

infernal-calling::conditional_ending.issue: The devil disappears at 0 hit points or spell end, but if concentration ends after command immunity it remains for 3d6 minutes; runtime lacks those branch endings.

infernal-calling::aftermath_or_memory.issue: If concentration ends after command immunity, the devil acts freely for 3d6 minutes before disappearing; runtime lacks post-concentration aftermath behavior.
infernal-calling::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon aftermath fields for post-control independent behavior and delayed disappearance.

insect-plague::choice_or_mode.issue: The detector matched ordinary point selection for the area spell, already represented by area targeting.

insect-plague::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Constitution save, half-damage result, immediate damage, enter-area damage, end-turn damage, and scaling are now represented.
insect-plague::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by three DAMAGE effects with saveEffect half.

insect-plague::terrain_or_surface.issue: The Lightly Obscured and Difficult Terrain area mechanics are now represented by typed TERRAIN effects.
insect-plague::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No new terrain field required for this pass.
insect-plague::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by TERRAIN difficult and TERRAIN obscuring effects.

insect-plague::healing_or_restoration.issue: The detector matched the Lightly Obscured glossary reference; no healing or restoration mechanic is present.

insect-plague::environmental_change.issue: The persistent locust swarm's damage, obscuring, and difficult-terrain effects are now represented as runtime effects.
insect-plague::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional environmental-change field required for this pass.
insect-plague::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE, TERRAIN, and sensory UTILITY effects.

legend-lore::message_or_communication.issue: The detector matched the wording of information delivery, but the spell does not send a message to another creature; it is an information/knowledge utility.

legend-lore::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Utility type is now information, but runtime still lacks typed fields for famous person/place/object input, already-known precision scaling, accurate-but-figurative output, and failure if the subject is not famous.
legend-lore::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge-query fields for subject type, fame requirement, precision based on prior knowledge, and failure mode.

maelstrom::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The start-of-turn Strength save, fail-only damage, and save-gated pull are now represented.
maelstrom::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by turn_start DAMAGE and MOVEMENT effects.

maelstrom::forced_movement.issue: The failed-save 10-foot pull toward the center is now represented as a MOVEMENT pull effect.

maelstrom::terrain_or_surface.issue: Runtime now represents Difficult Terrain and water creation, but the target point's eligibility as ground or a body of water remains prose-only.
maelstrom::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area placement surface eligibility fields.

maelstrom::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible point selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

maelstrom::created_object_or_structure.issue: The 5-foot-deep water mass is now represented as a creation utility and the terrain area carries the depth.
maelstrom::created_object_or_structure.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional created-structure field required for this pass.
maelstrom::created_object_or_structure.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by UTILITY creation plus TERRAIN area height.

maelstrom::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The detector matched the start-of-turn trigger for damage and movement; it is now represented directly as turn_start runtime effects, not a ward/alarm.
maelstrom::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by turn_start DAMAGE and MOVEMENT effects.

maelstrom::resource_or_consumption.issue: The detector matched water creation and placement surface text, but the spell does not consume a resource beyond its material component.

maelstrom::environmental_change.issue: The water area, difficult terrain, start-of-turn damage, and forced movement are now represented in runtime.
maelstrom::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional environmental-change field required for this pass.
maelstrom::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by UTILITY creation, TERRAIN, DAMAGE, and MOVEMENT effects.

maelstrom::conditional_ending.issue: The area lasts for the normal concentration duration and has no special conditional ending beyond duration/concentration.

immolation.title: Aftermath And Memory Effects
immolation.canonicalEvidence: If damage from this spell kills a target, the target is turned to ash.
immolation.jsonState: Runtime has damage and Burning effects but no typed death aftermath transformation.
immolation.issue: The target-to-ash death aftermath is mechanically relevant for corpse/object state but remains prose-only.
immolation.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death aftermath transformation fields for spell-kill outcomes.
immolation.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deathAftermath data for ash transformation.

maelstrom.title: Target Filters And Eligibility
maelstrom.canonicalEvidence: The point must be on the ground or in a body of water.
maelstrom.jsonState: targeting.validTargets is point with no surface eligibility.
maelstrom.issue: The area placement point must be on ground or in a body of water, but runtime targeting has no surface eligibility data.
maelstrom.recommendedTemplateChange: Add placement surface eligibility fields for area points.
maelstrom.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placementSurface data with ground and body_of_water values.
